_meta.source: Public LinkedIn / Twitter / podcast pages, re-verified on 2026-06-12 (profile URLs checked).
_meta.warning: Outreach must be researched and personalised. This dataset is a starting shortlist, not an auto-pilot. Topic tags use a controlled vocabulary so scoring stays deterministic. audience_size values are rough public estimates used only to break ranking ties — do not quote them.

influencers.name: Shep Hyken
influencers.role: Customer Service Speaker, NYT Bestselling Author
influencers.notes: Chief Amazement Officer. Paid keynote circuit. Best for podcast guest pitch + speaking opportunities, not direct product pitches.

influencers.name: Jeanne Bliss
influencers.notes: Hosted 'The Chief Customer Officer Human Duct Tape Show' podcast (2016-era; not her active format). CCO-level reach. Best fit for an executive-narrative post on CX leadership.

influencers.name: Blake Morgan
influencers.notes: Hosts The Modern Customer Podcast. Best fit for an AI-in-CS angle. Pitch via LinkedIn DM with a concrete customer story attached.

influencers.name: Bill Staikos
influencers.notes: Hosts Be Customer Led podcast. Practitioner-grounded. Pitch with an operating-CS story, not vision.

influencers.name: Adrian Swinscoe
influencers.notes: Hosts Punk CX podcast. UK-anchored. Loves contrarian framings — perfect for the 'augment vs replace' counter-narrative.

influencers.name: Dan Gingiss
influencers.notes: Hosts The Experience Maker Show (video/YouTube format; his earlier audio podcast was 'Experience This!' with Joey Coleman). Strong social-customer-care focus. Pitch with a social-channel CS story.

influencers.name: Annette Franz
influencers.role: CX Journey Mapper, CX Journey Inc Founder
influencers.notes: VoC + journey-mapping authority. Pitch when the story has a customer-journey data spine.

influencers.name: Stacy Sherman
influencers.role: Doing CX Right Founder, CX Strategist
influencers.notes: Hosts Doing CX Right podcast. Employee-experience angle is unusual — useful if the story has an agent-side metric.

influencers.name: Justin Robbins
influencers.notes: Contact-centre-industry analyst. Pitch with operational metrics (AHT, deflection, CSAT).

influencers.name: Nate Brown
influencers.notes: Co-founder of the CX Accelerator Slack community. Engage genuinely — overt prospecting in that community is frowned upon; relationship first.

influencers.name: Jeannie Walters
influencers.notes: Hosts the Experience Action podcast. Mid-market focus. Pitch when story has a mid-market customer.

influencers.name: Sarah Guo
influencers.role: Founder of Conviction (VC), No Priors Co-host
influencers.notes: VC-side reach. Best for AI/agent positioning, not CX-specific posts. Pitch via X DM with a concrete agent-architecture point.
